sections.paragraph: an ostrich, so called from its greediness and gluttony; see the root יָעַן . Once found in plur. יְעֵנִים Lam 4:3 in קרי; and there it is used ἐπικοίνως, of the female ostrich, for בְּנֹות יַעֲנָה. LXX. ὡς στρουθίον. Vulg. sicut struthio. (As to the sense compare Job 39:17). Of much more frequent use is-
